action.reasoning: Observation: DLinear baseline achieved MSE=0.4867 on test. Val loss still slowly decreasing. Analysis: Standard ETTh1 96->720 DLinear paper result is ~0.46. We can improve by training more epochs, using a simpler NLinear (just one linear with last-value normalization), or trying a channel-independent linear with longer training. Since val loss is still going down, longer training should help. Decision: Train longer (40 epochs) with lower LR schedule, and try a simpler 'NLinear' (one linear with subtraction of last value) which often performs better than DLinear on ETTh1 long-horizon. Actually, let me try a model that ensembles both. But to keep simple, increase epochs to 30 with cosine LR.
